title: Money is safe. I am safe with money.
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for anchoring the felt experience of financial safety.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 21 of the MONEY program, the final session of Phase 1. Use to consolidate three weeks of releasing money fear into a new baseline of calm.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 21 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the end of a week of money practice, or any time financial anxiety is running and you want to return to calm quickly.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 21 of the MONEY program. The statement marks the end of Phase 1: not a new fear to release, but an anchoring of what's been built. Safety with money as a fact, not an aspiration.
I am ready to release every old pattern of fear, panic, and tension around money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow deep safety, steady calm, and lasting security with money. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 21 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
